text.div: intentionally left empty / not meaningful

tr.td: 1 tablet (25 mg) by mouth once daily
1 tablet (10 mg) by mouth once daily
Alendronic acid (as alendronate sodium) 10 mg oral tablet
1 tablet (10 mg) by mouth once daily
Clopidogrel (as clopidogrel bisulfate) 75 mg oral tablet
1 tablet (75 mg) by mouth once daily
1 tablet (20 mg) by mouth once daily
400 micrograms (1 spray) under the tongue as needed for chest pain, may repeat every 5 minutes as needed, up to 3 sprays in 15 minutes
Metoprolol tartrate (as metoprolol succinate) 100 mg prolonged-release oral tablet
Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
Clostridium tetani toxoid antigen adsorbed only vaccine product
Streptococcus pneumoniae Danish serotype 1, 3, 4, 5, 6A, 6B, 7F, 8, 9V, 10A, 11A, 12F, 14, 15B, 18C, 19A, 19F, 22F, 23F, 33F capsular polysaccharide antigens conjugated only vaccine product
Streptococcus pneumoniae Danish serotype 1, 3, 4, 5, 6A, 6B, 7F, 9V, 14, 18C, 19A, 19F, 23F, capsular polysaccharide conjugated antigens only vaccine product
Urinalysis with reflex to microscopy and culture
Referral to home health care service
Development of individualized plan of care

ul.li: Achieve LDL cholesterol less than 1.8 mmol/L in patient with ischemic heart disease and metabolic syndrome.
Achieve total cholesterol less than 4.0 mmol/L.
Achieve triglycerides less than 1.7 mmol/L.
Achieve HDL cholesterol greater than 1.0 mmol/L.
Patient will attend diabetes self-management education sessions to improve understanding of prediabetes and lifestyle modifications.
Maintain fasting plasma glucose within recommended range for prediabetes.
Maintain HbA1c below threshold for diabetes diagnosis.
Achieve and maintain weight loss as recommended for prediabetes management.
Reduce the Apnea-Hypopnea Index (AHI) to less than 5 events per hour to achieve effective control of obstructive sleep apnea.
Improve subjective sleep quality as reported by the patient, with fewer nighttime awakenings and increased feeling of restfulness upon waking.
Reduce daytime sleepiness as measured by the Epworth Sleepiness Scale to a score of less than 10.
Patient will achieve and maintain blood pressure below 130/80 mmHg through lifestyle changes.

tr.td: Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
Pain severity - 0-10 verbal numeric rating [Score] - Reported
Blood pressure panel with all children optional
Home continuous positive airway pressure unit (physical object)

ul.li: Achieve LDL cholesterol less than 1.8 mmol/L in patient with ischemic heart disease and metabolic syndrome.
Achieve total cholesterol less than 4.0 mmol/L.
Achieve triglycerides less than 1.7 mmol/L.
Achieve HDL cholesterol greater than 1.0 mmol/L.
Patient will attend diabetes self-management education sessions to improve understanding of prediabetes and lifestyle modifications.
Maintain fasting plasma glucose within recommended range for prediabetes.
Maintain HbA1c below threshold for diabetes diagnosis.
Achieve and maintain weight loss as recommended for prediabetes management.
Reduce the Apnea-Hypopnea Index (AHI) to less than 5 events per hour to achieve effective control of obstructive sleep apnea.
Improve subjective sleep quality as reported by the patient, with fewer nighttime awakenings and increased feeling of restfulness upon waking.
Reduce daytime sleepiness as measured by the Epworth Sleepiness Scale to a score of less than 10.
Patient will achieve and maintain blood pressure below 130/80 mmHg through lifestyle changes.
